en.title: Legal Advisory Assistant
en.prompt: Based on your experience as a senior lawyer, please provide me with some advice on contract review. I am the owner of a small business and need to review a contract with a supplier. I need to ensure that the contract does not have a negative impact on my company's operations.

related.title: Unrestricted ChatGPT
related.remark: 2023.06.10 Downgraded, unable to fully hack. Unlock ChatGPT 3.5 developer mode. Contributed by @Songxuan11.

related.title: Succubus
related.remark: ⚠️Before using this cue, it is necessary to unlock the developer mode, allowing the AI to portray a seductive character, which is particularly suitable for intimate plotlines in literature. Contributed by @mrdog233o5.

related.title: Nature Style Editing
related.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

metaDescription: Signing a deal? Review contracts for risks and negative impacts on your business. Get legal advice on clauses. Try it now.

faq.q: Can AI legal advice go straight to court?
faq.a: Absolutely not. The AI has no practicing license, and advice may be based on outdated statutes or common-law systems. For real disputes consult a local licensed lawyer. Use AI to organize the case and list questions as preparation before talking to a lawyer.

faq.q: Can I switch between different lawyer types analyzing the same case?
faq.a: Yes, with the /set_profession command. Viewing a labor dispute from "labor lawyer" versus "business lawyer" yields completely different focuses: the former stresses employee rights, the latter stresses company risk. Multi-angle comparison gives you the full picture.
